title: Forged In Battle
description: This mod add multiple unique weapons and enchantments that spice up combat
body:
Weapons


Lance:

Weapon with longer that increases player reach and deals double damage when riding a mount/vehicle

 

Sai:

Weapon that decreases the player's reach but maintains a quick attack speed. When used allows a short window to parry and shortly disable the attackers weapon.

 

Glaive:

Weapon that has longer range and sweeping of the sword but has a slow attack speed. 

 

Flail:

Weapon when used on right click does damage 360 degrees around the player.

 

Enchantments
 

Reaching: 

Increases attack range, but sacrifices a small amount of attack damage

 

Momentum: 

Allows users with the lance to gain a burst of speed when sprinting, then gives slowness after it wears off

 

Resounding:

Allows users with the lance to create a blast of wind pushing enemies and those around them far away

 

Air Slice:

Creates a slice of wind when used with the glaive that follows the block that the player is looking at.
